profile.name: Fernando Freire
profile.bio: Fullstack Software Engineer passionate about creating efficient and creative solutions. React, Node.js, and PHP are my favorite tools. Unfortunately, I'm a fan of Nintendo.

details: Developed high-impact full-stack solutions for Brazil’s Ministry of Foreign Affairs using PHP, Zend Framework, Doctrine ORM, PostgreSQL, React, and Angular serving 10,000+ diplomatic staff across 200+ international posts
Improved system performance by 40% by restructuring backend services, reducing API calls and optimizing database queries across multiple high-traffic screens
Increased unit test coverage from 45% to 80% by actively creating and fixing test suites, strengthening code quality and reducing production bugs by 35%
Architected scalable front-end components in React and Angular reducing page load times by 30% through code splitting and lazy loading strategies
Developed meeting scheduling platform connecting internal teams with 200+ suppliers, reducing coordination time by 50% and improving vendor relationship management
Created barcode-based inventory withdrawal system for meat and produce departments, streamlining stock management workflow and reducing processing time by 60%
Engineered product registration application managing supplier data, taxation rules, promotions, images, and wholesale categories for 50,000+ SKUs
Developed automated ETL process migrating 750,000+ student records from legacy system to Laravel 8 with zero downtime, scheduled via CRON for off-peak execution
Created detailed mapping documentation between legacy and new database schemas, ensuring data integrity and facilitating smooth migration process
Built promotional websites for marketing agency clients, delivering responsive designs and optimized performance
Implemented database-driven features and custom backend logic meeting diverse client requirements and business objectives
Built custom punch machine game with hardware integration, including C/C# scripts to interpret Arduino weight sensor data ensuring accurate real-time communication
Designed vector graphics for game interface inspired by Street Fighter II bonus stage, delivering polished user experience
Created complete web platform for payroll lending sector featuring lead registration, advanced consortium letter filtering, and interactive calculators with demonstration tutorials

experience.company: Projeto Educacional: CPA Bay Area - IESB
details: Developed internal applications using PHP and Laravel addressing specific institutional needs for educational institution
Contributed to initial phases of Brasilia National Forest (FLONA) mapping project, establishing technical scope and system architecture foundations

education.institution: Pontifícia Universidade Católica do Paraná - PUC-PR
details: Focus on mobile development with React Native, Kotlin, Swift, and Flutter
Development of responsive and accessible designs for multiple platforms with Figma
Structuring various mobile software architectures

education.institution: Instituto de Educação Superior de Brasília - IESB
details: Focus on practical software development with various languages and frameworks (C, Java, JavaFX, PHP, Laravel, Javascript, SQL)
Analysis and development of documentation for APIs and web systems
